name: IX_AppSettings_Key
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_AppSettings_Key ON AppSettings(Key)

name: IX_ChatMessages_ConversationId_Id
sql: CREATE INDEX IX_ChatMessages_ConversationId_Id ON ChatMessages(ConversationId, Id)

name: IX_CoreBackgroundTasks_Type_UpdatedAt
sql: CREATE INDEX IX_CoreBackgroundTasks_Type_UpdatedAt ON CoreBackgroundTasks(TaskType, UpdatedAt DESC)

name: IX_ProactiveTriggerRules_RuleId
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_ProactiveTriggerRules_RuleId ON ProactiveTriggerRules(RuleId)

name: IX_ProactiveTriggerStates_RuleId
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_ProactiveTriggerStates_RuleId ON ProactiveTriggerStates(RuleId)

name: IX_TimerRecords_RecordId
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_TimerRecords_RecordId ON TimerRecords(RecordId)

name: IX_VoiceCacheGenerations_Status_UpdatedAt
sql: CREATE INDEX IX_VoiceCacheGenerations_Status_UpdatedAt ON VoiceCacheGenerations(Status, UpdatedAt)

name: IX_VoiceRoleCards_RoleId
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_VoiceRoleCards_RoleId ON VoiceRoleCards(RoleId)

name: UX_VoiceCacheGenerations_Context
sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UX_VoiceCacheGenerations_Context ON VoiceCacheGenerations(RoleId, IntimacyLevel, CacheKey)

name: UX_VoiceRoleAudioCaches_Slot
sql:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX UX_VoiceRoleAudioCaches_Slot
  ON VoiceRoleAudioCaches(RoleId, IntimacyLevel, CacheKey, TriggerId, BodyPart)
